# Auto-generated walkthrough guide

# look Family Zoo By Sharpee Tutorial Type HELP for instructions. Zoo Entrance
#   You stand before the wrought-iron gates of the Willowbrook Family Zoo.
> look
# south Main Path A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo.
#   Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside
#   the path.
> south
# examine signs Arrow signs: PETTING ZOO (east), AVIARY (west), EXIT (north).
> examine signs
# east Petting Zoo A cheerful open-air enclosure filled with friendly animals.
> east
# examine goats Three pygmy goats hoping you have food. *DING DONG* "Attention
#   visitors! The Willowbrook Family Zoo will be closing in three hours.
> examine goats
# west Main Path A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo.
#   Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside
#   the path.
> west
# west Aviary You step inside a soaring mesh dome. Brilliantly colored parrots
#   chatter from rope perches, and a toucan eyes you curiously from a branch
#   overhead.
> west
# examine toucan A Toco toucan with an enormous orange-and-black bill.
> examine toucan
# east Main Path A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo.
#   Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside
#   the path.
> east
# north Zoo Entrance You stand before the wrought-iron gates of the
#   Willowbrook Family Zoo.
> north
